final:
module RefModule(
  input [7:0] In0,
  input [1:0] In1,
  input clk,
  output reg [9:0] dout  // Change output to reg type
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    dout[9:8] <= In1;
    dout[7:0] <= In0;
  end

endmodule
